CREATE TABLE my_instances (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, status VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO my_instances (id, name, status) VALUES (1, 'my_instance_of_linux', 'stopped');

CREATE PROCEDURE start_instance_test() { DECLARE access_key VARCHAR, sec_token VARCHAR, p_name VARCHAR; access_key := 'AKIAJI7ZL427TI5EDF5A'; sec_token := 'CGI/UMaXf2LRUctaj/HGJ57UNy/t7fNCshh8wpJg'; p_name := (SELECT name FROM my_instances WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'stopped'); IF p_name IS NOT NULL THEN DB.DBA.AMAZON_START_INSTANCE(access_key, p_name, sec_token); END IF; } ;
CREATE TABLE instance_logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, instance_id INT, action VARCHAR, timestamp TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO instance_logs (log_id, instance_id, action, timestamp) VALUES (1, 1, 'start', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

CREATE PROCEDURE test_instance_start() { DECLARE access_key VARCHAR, sec_token VARCHAR; access_key := 'AKIAJI7ZL427TI5EDF5A'; sec_token := 'CGI/UMaXf2LRUctaj/HGJ57UNy/t7fNCshh8wpJg'; DB.DBA.AMAZON_START_INSTANCE(access_key, 'non_existing_instance', sec_token); } ;
CREATE TABLE credentials (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, access_key VARCHAR, sec_token VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO credentials (user_id, access_key, sec_token) VALUES (1, 'AKIAJI7ZL427TI5EDF5A', 'CGI/UMaXf2LRUctaj/HGJ57UNy/t7fNCshh8wpJg');

CREATE PROCEDURE start_instance_with_credential() { DECLARE p_name VARCHAR; DECLARE access_key VARCHAR; DECLARE sec_token VARCHAR; SELECT access_key, sec_token INTO access_key, sec_token FROM credentials WHERE user_id = 1; p_name := 'my_instance_of_linux'; DB.DBA.AMAZON_START_INSTANCE(access_key, p_name, sec_token); } ;
CREATE TABLE instance_states (state_id INT PRIMARY KEY, instance_name VARCHAR, state VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO instance_states (state_id, instance_name, state) VALUES (1, 'my_instance_of_linux', 'stopped');

CREATE PROCEDURE start_all_stopped_instances() { DECLARE access_key VARCHAR, sec_token VARCHAR; access_key := 'AKIAJI7ZL427TI5EDF5A'; sec_token := 'CGI/UMaXf2LRUctaj/HGJ57UNy/t7fNCshh8wpJg'; FOR instance IN (SELECT instance_name FROM instance_states WHERE state = 'stopped') LOOP DB.DBA.AMAZON_START_INSTANCE(access_key, instance.instance_name, sec_token); END LOOP; } ;
CREATE TABLE access_logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, instance_id INT, action VARCHAR, log_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO access_logs (log_id, user_id, instance_id, action, log_time) VALUES (1, 1, 1, 'start', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
